mapper.sql: select id, lname, company, date_format(theday, '%Y-%m-%d') as theday, create_time, bigc, bigck, bigf, smailc, smailck, smailf, bigc_ren, bigck_ren, bigf_ren, smailc_ren, smailck_ren, smailf_ren, bigc_kuang, bigc_fei, bigck_kuang, bigck_fei, bigf_kuang, bigf_fei, smailc_kuang, smailc_fei, smailck_kuang, smailck_fei, smailf_kuang, smailf_fei from a_mdispatch
